title: CraftersKitchen
body:
# Crafters Kitchen 
 ![Sandwich](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8Lvra2iu/images/6759bafa61ab20c60038647d8c0e0c57aef3787a.png)
  
This mod is able to make the customizable Food!

Also You can Decoration for Foods!
  
## Sandwich

Put Food In your sandwich! ...even poison food

And You can Decoration on Sandwich with soup!(Default is Mushroom Stew and BeetRoot Stew can)

## Planned Feature

Topping cake

Customizable Stew
